title: Which evangelion scene scarred you the most
display_title: Which evangelion scene scarred you the most
wikitext:
[]: Which evangelion scene scarred you the most?             Quote Post by trkk-KAAN » Thu Feb 23, 2012 2:26 pm what scene had you scarred?

[]:             Quote Post by deeRez » Thu Feb 23, 2012 3:31 pm You should edit your post and post your take on it as well. As for my answer, nothing really scared me in Eva. It's not like I go to sleep at night worrying that Gendo's out plotting the end of the world. Though the closest emotion to fear, would be the worry that my favorite character was about to die: Misato. I still think Shinji should have taken her up the elevator with him. B|

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Thu Feb 23, 2012 3:37 pm I was never scared by the series, shocked yes but never frightened, but fear for a character’s well being yes. I did fear for the cast’s well being during the course of EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Feb 23, 2012 3:45 pm Evangelion is not scary.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Thu Feb 23, 2012 4:24 pm Rei spin freaked me out a bit but nothing scary.

[]:             Quote Post by BulletShoot » Thu Feb 23, 2012 4:28 pm Eva's more disturbing than scary, but everyone has their own version's on what they think those words mean. I for one don't have a definition of what I would considerer scary. I don't really like the word scary, it sounds clumsy and childish to me for some reason.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Thu Feb 23, 2012 9:15 pm What scared me the most, huh? Hmm... EoE: (obvious choice) the Third impact... that, and GNR Rei. That left a scar my otaku life. And I'll state DeeRez's statment about Misato... WHYYYYYYY?! Rebuild: Eva 01 vs. EVA 03 (Bardiel) battle. The changes that they did are more disturbing than the TV series' battle. Never seen it? Well, BE PREPARED.

[]:             Quote Post by Tankred » Thu Feb 23, 2012 9:38 pm It's not scary. Or disturbing.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Thu Feb 23, 2012 10:08 pm This thread should be "Which evangelion scene scarred you the most?".

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Feb 23, 2012 10:09 pm The souless vessels in the Rei tank all turning their heads at once

[]:             Quote Post by Jadley » Fri Feb 24, 2012 12:08 am when shogouki eats zeruel.......... watched it for the first time when i was 7 years old, you can imagine. Rebuild: Uh oh... most disturbing scene i saw was EVA-01 VS EVA-03 AKA Bardiel. EoE: Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by ONIAgent150 » Fri Feb 24, 2012 12:45 am The first time EVA-01 goes berserk. That's the wrath of the gods right there.

[]: Or Blood C, f*ck that. B(             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Fri Feb 24, 2012 1:38 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Evangelion is not scary.

[]:             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Fri Feb 24, 2012 2:02 pm I think the better question would be which scene didn't scar you the most? But in all seriousness, I wasn't actually scared by the show, but more like fazmotron said: It left a scar. For me, the one scene that left a bad mark on me was, of course, the Kitchen scene. Every sense of friendship between Asuka and Shinji was just shattered from that point on. :(

[]:             Quote Post by Lorkhan » Fri Feb 24, 2012 4:00 pm Eva was never scary, but there were plenty of parts that were hard to watch. Episode 22 was the hardest for me to watch. After everything was said and done the only thing in my head was "Goddamn".

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Mon Feb 27, 2012 1:25 pm The fish tank Rei scene when I was twelve.

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Mon Feb 27, 2012 3:22 pm I think it would be episode 18, Shinji screaming "stop it stop it stop it..." While being completely helpless and just... Watching how the dummy plug dismembers a boy like him. Or maybe also episode 16 when he's getting absorbed in the Sea of Dirac, his screams of despair must have been tough for Misato, a shame that we couldn't see Asuka or Rei's expressions during the thing tough.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Feb 27, 2012 4:35 pm Related -- http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=137 It has to be Rei's head impacting in the Pacific, followed closely by Shinji strangling Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Feb 27, 2012 4:46 pm Evisceration of Eva-02 up through her death, probably.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Mon Feb 27, 2012 8:11 pm The Asuka cameltoe scene in 2.0 shook my faith in my childhood heroes. Chilled me to the bone, man.
